arts.sum: Liverpool could face competition from five other Premier League clubs for the signature of Brazilian midfielder Ederson, according to reports. The Reds have been heavily linked with Ederson in recent months but failed to sign a defensive midfielder over the summer, also missing out on Spain international Martin Zubimendi.
